contents: Require Import Basics.Overture Basics.Tactics Basics.Equivalences Basics.Iff.
Require Import Basics.Overture Basics.Tactics Basics.Equivalences Basics.Iff.

Require Import Groups.Group AbGroups.Abelianization AbGroups.AbelianGroup
  Groups.Commutator Groups.QuotientGroup.

(** * Perfect Groups *)

(** ** Definition *)

(** A group is perfect if its abelianization is trivial. *)
Class IsPerfect (G : Group) := contr_abel_isperfect :: IsTrivialGroup (abel G).
(** A group is perfect if its commutator subgroup is the maximal subgroup. *)

#[export] Instance isperfect_maximal_commutator (G : Group)
  : IsMaximalSubgroup [G, G] -> IsPerfect G.

goals.conclusion: IsMaximalSubgroup [maximal_subgroup G, maximal_subgroup G] -> IsPerfect G
IsMaximalSubgroup [maximal_subgroup G, maximal_subgroup G] -> IsPerfect G

contents: (** Conversely, the commutator subgroup of any perfect group is the maximal subgroup. *)

Definition ismaximalsubgroup_commutator_isperfect `{Univalence} (G : Group)
  : IsPerfect G -> IsMaximalSubgroup [G, G].

goals.conclusion: IsPerfect G -> IsMaximalSubgroup [maximal_subgroup G, maximal_subgroup G]
IsPerfect G -> IsMaximalSubgroup [maximal_subgroup G, maximal_subgroup G]

contents:
(** ** Basic properties *)
  
(** All simple non-abelian groups are perfect. *)
(* Since [G] is simple, we can assume the commutator [ [G, G] ] is either trivial or maximal. *)

goals.conclusion: grp_commutator x y * y * x = y * x
grp_commutator x y * (y * x) = y * x

contents: (** A quotient of a perfect group is perfect. *)

goals.conclusion:
forall x : G,
[maximal_subgroup (G / N), maximal_subgroup (G / N)] (grp_quotient_map x)

forall x : G,
[maximal_subgroup G, maximal_subgroup G] x ->
[maximal_subgroup (G / N), maximal_subgroup (G / N)] (grp_quotient_map x)

contents:
change ([G / N, G / N] (grp_quotient_map ?x))
    with (subgroup_preimage grp_quotient_map [G / N, G / N] x).

goals.conclusion:
forall x : G,
[maximal_subgroup G, maximal_subgroup G] x ->
subgroup_preimage grp_quotient_map
  [maximal_subgroup (G / N), maximal_subgroup (G / N)] x

forall x y : G,
maximal_subgroup G x ->
maximal_subgroup G y ->
subgroup_preimage grp_quotient_map
  [maximal_subgroup (G / N), maximal_subgroup (G / N)] 
  (grp_commutator x y)

subgroup_preimage grp_quotient_map
  [maximal_subgroup (G / N), maximal_subgroup (G / N)] 
  (grp_commutator x y)

contents: change ([G / N, G / N] (grp_quotient_map (grp_commutator x y))).
